title: Chromia — Blockchain Identity, UX/UI & Marketing Design :: Behance
metaDescription: We teamed up with Chromia, a Web3 blockchain platform that’s on a mission to make decentralized apps faster, smarter, and more accessible. Their vision is simple: blockchain should feel creative, human, and open to everyone — not just the tech-savvy few....
